title: Webinars - send us your ideas!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys

I wanted to post here to see if you have any ideas for webinars for paid users!

We try and do a mix of webinars between Workflows, Best Practices or Feature Spotlights and would love to hear what you’d like to see.

Share with us your ideas here

posts.author: ljcudney (Lauren Cudney)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to see a webinar on set up / best practices. As a new user, I’d love to get everything set up the right way the first time so we’re not having to go back and re-do a bunch of work once we find a better process

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ljcudney

Thanks for letting me know!

The amazing thing about monday.com is that it is so so flexible so any team can set up their boards to suit their exact workflow. For that reason it’s hard to run a webinar on “how to get set up” but we can definitely run one on the most common ways to manage tasks and projects for example.

Or we run webinars often about how to set up for specific use cases/industries etc.

What is it you’re looking to manage with monday.com?
